# SMS Advert

[![License](https://img.shields.io/badge/license-Proprietary-4b5563.svg)](https://git.xtelecom.ro/enso-ui/sms-advert/-/blob/main/LICENSE)

## Description
SMS Advert integration settings page for Enso UI.
## Installation
This package is distributed as part of the private Enso UI workspace and is normally consumed from the Solarlink client bundle.
## Features
- ships route-aware page modules consumed by the Enso application shell
- includes index/list pages backed by Enso tables, forms, or integration settings
## Usage
```vue
<script setup>
import Index from '@enso-ui/sms-advert/src/bulma/pages/integrations/settings/Index.vue';
</script>
```
## API
### Route pages

The practical public surface is page-oriented and centered on the route modules shipped by the package.

Pages:
- `src/bulma/pages/integrations/settings/Index.vue`
## Routes

SMS Advert ships the following named route entries:

- `integrations.smsAdvert.settings.index`
  Path fragment: `settings`
  Route file: `src/bulma/routes/integrations/smsAdvert/settings.js`
## Companion Backend Package

- [`laravel-enso/sms-advert`](https://docs.laravel-enso.com/backend/sms-advert.html) [↗](https://git.xtelecom.ro/laravel-enso/sms-advert)

## Depends On
- No additional Enso UI dependencies.
## Contributions
are welcome. Pull requests are great, but issues are good too.
Thank you to all the people who already contributed to Enso!
